summary:
Fix verified. The two missing lines in `InstallSnapshot` (`snapshot.go:49-53`):

1. **`n.raftLog.CompactUpTo(snap.LastIncludedIndex)`** — removes log entries already baked into the snapshot, preventing them from being replayed after restart
2. **`n.commitIndex = snap.LastIncludedIndex`** — keeps commitIndex consistent with lastApplied, so recovery doesn't drag lastApplied back to 0
